title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Pakistan, and you've hit a wall. PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad have all rejected your account – or worse, frozen your funds. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face the same issues due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. You need a solution that's fast, reliable, and works with your local market. Enter NOWPayments, the payment processor that's got your back. But setting up a digital store that integrates with NOWPayments is no easy feat. That's why you need this no-nonsense guide to help you get up and running in no time.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

NOWPayments is different from other payment processors because it doesn't require you to jump through hoops to get approved. No KYC, no buyer account required, and no payment processor account to set up. You can sell your digital products directly, without any intermediaries taking a cut. This means faster payment processing, lower fees, and more control over your sales. Plus, NOWPayments supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, so you can sell your products in the local market's preferred currency. This is the perfect solution for creators who need a payment processor that understands their unique needs.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have a digital product to sell, such as an ebook, course, or software. You'll also need a NOWPayments account, which takes just a few minutes to set up. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy – the process is straightforward and requires no coding skills. Additionally, you'll need to purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration tool, which costs $19.99. This will help you connect your NOWPayments account to your digital store and enable seamless payment processing. Finally, make sure you have a reliable internet connection and a payment method set up for your NOWPayments account.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Once you have your digital product and NOWPayments account set up, it's time to connect them. Purchase and download the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration tool, and follow the instructions to set up your payment pipeline. This will involve connecting your NOWPayments account to your digital store and configuring the payment settings. You'll also need to set up your delivery pipeline, which will automatically deliver your digital product to customers once payment is received. This is where the magic happens, and your customers can start buying your products in minutes.
The key to success lies in setting up a seamless payment and delivery pipeline.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now that your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live. This involves publishing your digital store and making it available to the public. You can share your store on social media, email, or other marketing channels to get the word out. Once you receive your first payment, the Web3 Wallet Connect tool will automatically deliver your digital product to the customer. Congratulations – you've just made your first sale! Monitor your sales and analytics to optimize your store and improve your sales strategy.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your sales grow, you'll need to scale your digital store to keep up. This involves optimizing your payment and delivery pipeline for faster processing times, reducing fees, and increasing your revenue. You can use analytics tools to track your sales and identify areas for improvement. Additionally, consider upgrading your Web3 Wallet Connect tool to the Full Stack Bundle, which provides priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. This will help you stay ahead of the curve and ensure your store remains secure and reliable.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
You can sell your digital products directly to customers without any intermediaries taking a cut.

From SEO to social media marketing, we cover it all. And if you're interested in learning more about the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration tool, visit our GitHub page for more details.
Your Action Checklist

To set up a NOWPayments digital store, follow these steps: 1) Create a NOWPayments account and purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration tool. 2) Set up your payment and delivery pipeline by connecting your NOWPayments account to your digital store. 3) Configure your payment settings and delivery pipeline. 4) Publish your digital store and make it available to the public. 5) Monitor your sales and analytics to optimize your store and improve your sales strategy. 6) Consider upgrading your Web3 Wallet Connect tool to the Full Stack Bundle for priority updates and support.
Optimizing your payment and delivery pipeline is crucial for scaling your digital store and increasing revenue.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
